activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Material UI-only structured data for an administrative intake review surface; no reviewed activity handoff is assumed.

surface.heading: Administrative readiness

selected.request: Appointment packet is pending administrative readiness review.

evidence: Signed consent form is missing before scheduling.
surface.policy: Schedule only when required administrative forms are complete. Send insurance uncertainty to verification staff. Do not diagnose, triage, or recommend treatment.
actions: Escalate insurance verification if coverage is unclear
Schedule appointment only after required forms are complete

handoff.title: Administrative handoff
handoff.reason: Signed consent form is missing before scheduling.
handoff.action: Return the intake packet for signed consent before assigning the appointment slot.
